mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN (SELECT target_id, name FROM attach WHERE target = 'profile') pa ON pa.target_id = m.id
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS commentCount

p.id, CASE WHEN p.deleted_at IS NOT NULL THEN NULL ELSE p.title END AS title, COALESCE(m.nickname, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS authorNickname, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, , p.created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT * FROM post ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post
deleted_at IS NULL
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT p.id, p.title, COALESCE(m.nickname, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS authorNickname, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, , p.created_at AS createdAt, false AS liked, , COALESCE(p.cover_image, (SELECT a.first_image FROM trip_candidate tc JOIN attraction a ON a.id = tc.attraction_id WHERE tc.trip_id = p.trip_id ORDER BY tc.id LIMIT 1)) AS cover_image_url FROM post p LEFT JOIN member m ON m.id = p.member_id
p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.id, p.member_id AS memberId, p.title, p.content, COALESCE(m.nickname, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS authorNickname, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id AND pl.member_id = #{memberId}) AS liked, (SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post_bookmark pb WHERE pb.post_id = p.id AND pb.member_id = #{memberId}) AS bookmarked, (p.member_id = #{memberId}) AS mine, , t.id AS tripId, t.title AS tripTitle, t.start_date AS tripStartDate, t.end_date AS tripEndDate, t.member_count AS tripMemberCount FROM post p LEFT JOIN member m ON m.id = p.member_id
LEFT JOIN trip t ON t.id = p.trip_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (member_id, trip_id, title, content, cover_image) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{tripId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage})
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
